On Mon, Sep 18, 2023 at 4:33 PM Stacey Chang Intertek <stacey.chang@intertek.com<mailto:stacey.chang@intertek.com>> wrote:
Hi Shivam and Grant,
Thank you for taking our call just now. As mentioned, we have you scheduled to start on Friday, the 22nd.
Please let us know if you need a online shared folder to upload documentation.
In addition, is the product set up as you being the applicant and the manufacturer? Attached is a CIS that will also need to be filled out/provided.
On a side note, I spoke with Reema, your assigned EMC engineer. She is currently working on the report and is waiting for Bryce to respond back tonight regarding some data. Once she has completed the report, she will let you know when she has submitted it for review.
Thank you!
Stacey Chang
Regional Production Specialist
(Medical, Safety, NFL, Semi)
Mobile – (210) 243-3697
(Texts Preferred)
Intertek, 1365 Adams Ct, Menlo Park, CA 94025
Hi Stacey,

Quote No:  Qu-01390131-0
